title: manifest
description: skogai.json: the contract a project promises to fulfill. Declares which agents/skills/mcps/profile/model the harness must install and keep in sync. Validating this only confirms the promise is well-formed, not that the promised entities exist on disk -- see agent.schema.json and skill.schema.json for those.

targets.description: Agent ids this project promises to sync into -- each must resolve to an agent.schema.json entry in the harness's registry

skills.description: Skill ids this project promises to install -- each must resolve to a skill.schema.json document

mcpServer.description: A Model Context Protocol server entry: either stdio (command) or remote (url), never both.
